'''鈭歞h-b-k-j''' ('''kadhabkejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bebathe|bebathe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bebathe|bebathe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-b-k-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadhabkejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhabkejoko|thidhabkejoko]] || [[word:jidhabkejoko|jidhabkejoko]] || [[word:shidhabkejoko|shidhabkejoko]] || [[word:kidhabkejoko|kidhabkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhabkejoko|thuthudhabkejoko]] || [[word:jujudhabkejoko|jujudhabkejoko]] || [[word:shushudhabkejoko|shushudhabkejoko]] || [[word:kukudhabkejoko|kukudhabkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhabkejoko|thudhabkejoko]] || [[word:judhabkejoko|judhabkejoko]] || [[word:shudhabkejoko|shudhabkejoko]] || [[word:kudhabkejoko|kudhabkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhabkejoko|thudhabkejoko]] || [[word:judhabkejoko|judhabkejoko]] || [[word:shudhabkejoko|shudhabkejoko]] || [[word:kudhabkejoko|kudhabkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhabkejoko|thedhabkejoko]] || [[word:jedhabkejoko|jedhabkejoko]] || [[word:shedhabkejoko|shedhabkejoko]] || [[word:kedhabkejoko|kedhabkejoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhabkejoko|thodhabkejoko]] || [[word:jodhabkejoko|jodhabkejoko]] || [[word:shodhabkejoko|shodhabkejoko]] || [[word:kodhabkejoko|kodhabkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhabkejoko|thodhabkejoko]] || [[word:jodhabkejoko|jodhabkejoko]] || [[word:shodhabkejoko|shodhabkejoko]] || [[word:kodhabkejoko|kodhabkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhabkejoko|th忙dhabkejoko]] || [[word:j忙dhabkejoko|j忙dhabkejoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhabkejoko|sh忙dhabkejoko]] || [[word:k忙dhabkejoko|k忙dhabkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhabkejoko|thathadhabkejoko]] || [[word:jajadhabkejoko|jajadhabkejoko]] || [[word:shashadhabkejoko|shashadhabkejoko]] || [[word:kakadhabkejoko|kakadhabkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhabkejoko|thadhabkejoko]] || [[word:jadhabkejoko|jadhabkejoko]] || [[word:shadhabkejoko|shadhabkejoko]] || [[word:kadhabkejoko|kadhabkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhabkejoko|thadhabkejoko]] || [[word:jadhabkejoko|jadhabkejoko]] || [[word:shadhabkejoko|shadhabkejoko]] || [[word:kadhabkejoko|kadhabkejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
